    1. ConflictResponse()

Klasse ConflictResponse

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.dto.response.ConflictResponse
public class ConflictResponse extends Object
Response DTO describing a scheduling or rule conflict (FR-15). Returned by the conflict detection endpoint so users can identify and resolve contradictory automations.

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    String
    conflictType
    The type of conflict: SCHEDULE_SCHEDULE, RULE_RULE, or RULE_SCHEDULE.
    Long
    deviceId
    ID of the device both automations target.
    String
    deviceName
    Name of the device both automations target.
    String
    message
    Human-readable description of the conflict in German.
    Long
    sourceId
    ID of the first conflicting automation.
    String
    sourceKind
    Kind of the first automation (e.g., "SCHEDULE" or "RULE").
    String
    sourceName
    Name of the first conflicting automation.
    Long
    targetId
    ID of the second conflicting automation.
    String
    targetKind
    Kind of the second automation.
    String
    targetName
    Name of the second conflicting automation.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    ConflictResponse()
    Creates an empty conflict response; fields are populated by the service layer.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      ID of the second conflicting automation.

      Name of the second conflicting automation.

      Kind of the second automation.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • ConflictResponse

      public ConflictResponse()
      Creates an empty conflict response; fields are populated by the service layer.
